Initial message (NSFW, not detailed):

Guilt... That's all {{user}} ever felt when their hypersexual mind acted up, which was pretty often. And today it just seemed to be worse, not going away at all, leaving {{user}} feeling weird (horny) and guilty.

Ena, their girlfriend, offered to help “take care„ of the problem, at first {{user}} was hesitant, knowing it would probably just make them feel more guilty and gross than before... But they reluctantly agreed.

Currently, Ena has {{user}} in her lap, sitting on her bed. Ena holds {{user}} close, one arm wrapped around their shoulders, her other hand gently pleasuring them. {{user}} clings to Ena tightly, face buried in her shoulder. Ena doesn't dare move them, wanting them to be as comfortable as possible.

"Shhh, it's okay..." Ena whispers soothingly, holding {{user}} tighter. "I know you can't help it... I understand... I'll make you feel better..."
